title: Keyboard
description: Keyboard response settings for PsychoPy routines

oneOf.description: Predefined option: f and j keys. Usually for Yes/No responses (or other binary responses).
Predefined option: space key only. Usually for instruction or other non-response tasks.
Custom array of allowed keys. Usually for other situations.

forcedEndRoutine.description: Should a response force the end of the Routine (e.g end the trial)?

startTime.description: Start time to display the component in milliseconds

duration.description: Duration to display the component in milliseconds. Use -1 for infinite duration (allows ending with key press, but continues indefinitely without key press)
